new_claims.claim_text: Iran attacked Kuwait's Ministry of Oil.
Trump and Israel coordinated an attack against Iran's energy infrastructure.
US and Israel bomb petrochemical facilities in Iran.
Trump says Iran has 48 hours to open the Strait of Hormuz or 'all hell will reign down on Iran.'
Al Jazeera confirms the US and Israel have bombed over 760 schools and 350 health centers in Iran, intentionally obliterating mental health hospitals.
new_claims.notes: Highly emotional and unverified claim, attributing severe war crimes.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump has been taken to Walter Reed Hospital.
new_claims.notes: Explicitly stated as 'UNCONFIRMED' by the source, highlighting speculative information spread.

new_claims.claim_text: Video of automated sheep shearing is advanced Japanese technology.
new_claims.notes: Challenged as AI-generated by another user.
